experiment_1.Task: Predict treatment response from separate biomedical training and test TSV files in Galaxy using a tabular classification approach.
experiment_1.Prompt: I have separate training and test tables from a biomedical study where the goal is to predict whether a patient responds to treatment. Please choose an appropriate Galaxy classification method, train on the training table, evaluate only on the separate test table, and report the Galaxy tool you used, the target column name, and the test ROC-AUC. If a setting is unclear, make a small number of justified choices rather than an open-ended parameter sweep.
